title: platform-user — permissions
description: Permission seeder for the platform_admin guard. Every permission here is namespaced under `platform.platform_users.*` or `platform.platform_profiles.*` — the `sanctum` guard NEVER holds any of these. Seeded roles: `super_admin` (root Academorix authority), `ops` (day-to-day operations), `product` (product management), `security` (security engineering), `hr` (people operations), `compliance` (compliance officers + DPO). Fresh hires land with ZERO role assignments — super_admin grants roles + entitlements post-hire, per the least-privilege posture.

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.viewAny
permissions.description: List platform staff. Redacted list — no PII, no offboarding_reason.

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.view
permissions.description: Read a specific platform staff row. Redacted per PII gate.

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.view.pii
permissions.description: Unmutes email + phone + Slack/GitHub handles on the response. Every unmute writes an audit meta-row.

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.view.audit_trail
permissions.description: Read the 90-day audit-trail summary for a specific PlatformUser as actor.

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.hire
permissions.description: Create new PlatformUser rows via the hire flow.

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.update
permissions.description: Update employment metadata (department, employment_type, job_title, manager_id, hire_date).

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.offboard
permissions.description: Terminal offboarding. Kicks off the 24h access-revocation SLA + 90-day retention hold.

permissions.name: platform.platform_users.reassign_manager
permissions.description: Reassign a PlatformUser's manager. Enforces cycle detection + depth cap.

permissions.name: platform.platform_profiles.update.self
permissions.description: Update own PlatformProfile fields (except first_name + last_name, which are HR-controlled).

permissions.name: platform.platform_profiles.view.pii
permissions.description: Unmute PII fields (phone_e164, slack_handle, github_handle) on ANOTHER PlatformUser's profile.

permissions.name: platform.on_call.view
permissions.description: Read the on-call rotation resolver. Unmutes phone_e164 on the resolution response (specifically — not the general view.pii). Also seeded on the on_call_router_service_account for internal escalation tooling.

seed_note: New hires land with NO role assignments — the seeder provisions the permission catalogue + the seeded roles hold the mapped permissions, but a PlatformUser row is not associated with any role until a super_admin explicitly grants one via the future `access/rbac` module (Wave 1b). Two abilities (view.self + update.self on PlatformProfile) are the exception — they are seeded on EVERY baseline platform_admin role because every PlatformUser must be able to read + write their own profile.
